description_long: This is a classic banker’s lamp featuring a rectangular, curved green glass shade with a smooth, semi-translucent finish. The lamp is supported by a sturdy, round metallic base with a dark bronze or brass finish, and a vertical stem that connects to the shade via two side brackets. A pull-chain switch hangs from the right side, adding a vintage touch and providing manual control of the light. The lamp’s design is both functional and decorative, with the green glass diffusing light softly while the metal base ensures stability. The overall aesthetic is elegant and timeless, making it suitable for desks, libraries, or office environments. The lamp’s proportions and materials suggest durability and a focus on both utility and style.
description: A classic banker’s lamp with a green glass shade, bronze metal base, and pull-chain switch, combining vintage style with practical lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full green glass shade, central stem, round base, and the pull-chain hanging on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile of the glass shade and the metal arm connecting the shade to the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the green glass shade, both side brackets, and the symmetrical metal structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other end of the shade and the metal arm, with the pull-chain visible.
